channel.title: Munni Begum on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Munni Begum on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: lazzat-e-gam bada deejiye...
item.description:
This one is sung by Munni Begum. I couldn’t find the name of the writer. You can listen to it here on pz10.

lazzat-e-gam bada deejiye aap yun muskara deejiye…

keemat-e-dil bata deejiye khaaq le kar uda deejiye…

aap andhere mein kab tak rahein fer koi ghar jala deejiye…

chand kab tak gehan mein rahe aap zulfein hata deejiye…

mera daaman bahut saaf hai koi tohmat laga deejiye…

ik samundar ne avaaz di mujhko paani pila deejiye
